title: Looking for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
